headline: Why Does TTD Stock Keep Falling?
summary: The Trade Desk (TTD) stock fell 55% over the last six months, a large decline for a market leader. Its P/E multiple has declined sharply, contracting from over 60x to just 26.0x, even as revenues continued to grow. (TTD valuation metrics.

headline: TTD vs. AMZN: Which Ad-Tech Stock Is the Smarter Pick Now?
summary: With digital ads booming, Amazon's scale, AI-driven ad tools and diversified model may give it the edge over The Trade Desk.

headline: Is The Bottom In For The Trade Desk Stock?
summary: Trade Desk shares are trading marginally lower on Tuesday as traders stayed cautious on higher-beta ad-tech names following fresh headlines around leadership turnover and ongoing questions about audit transparency.

headline: The Trade Desk (TTD) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of digital advertising platform The Trade Desk (NASDAQ:TTD) jumped 6.9% in the afternoon session after it caught a strong bid as part of a broader "risk-on" rotation into oversold SaaS names.
